result.summary: Found 2 issues: one major accessibility concern with small disclaimer text and one minor layout/typography issue with text overflow in the terms section.

issues.description: The disclaimer text under the bonus offers section is extremely small and difficult to read, potentially violating accessibility standards for minimum font size (appears to be less than 12px)
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size of all disclaimer and terms text to at least 12px, and ensure sufficient line-height for readability. Consider using a lighter background or different contrast treatment to improve readability

issues.description: The disclaimer text appears to be truncated or cut off in the visual display, with important terms and conditions information potentially hidden from users
issues.suggestion: Ensure all terms and conditions text is fully visible and not cut off; consider using an expandable 'Read More' section or linking to full terms on a separate page rather than displaying truncated text
